description: Described Improving as a '$100M+ technology services firm' in the Meredith Anastasio call prep sheet and talking points. This is materially incorrect. Improving is a $300M global company with 2500+ people worldwide, focused on modern digital services: AI, Data, Application Development, and Platform Engineering.
correction: Improving is a $300M global modern digital services company with 2500+ employees worldwide. Services: AI, Data, Application Development, Platform Engineering. Not '$100M+ Texas-focused IT services'.
systemic_fix: Update MEMORY.md with correct Improving company description and financials. Always use verified figures from identity files — do not derive company scale from the One Texas revenue target ($72.5M Texas revenue) and mistake it for total company revenue.
